signup__role__title: Who are you setting this up for?
signup__role__couple_card__desc_v2: Create a wedding book your guests will love — voice messages, photos, and memories you keep for life.
signup__role__pro_card__desc: Manage Ovation events for your clients as a photographer, planner, or agency.
signup__pro_business__subtitle: Just a name — you can update this any time in your settings.
signup__pro_plan__select_required: Please select a plan to continue.
signup__book_details__subtitle: Just first names or nicknames — whatever your guests will recognize.
signup__book_details__venue_hint: Used on guest cards. Optional — just a city works too.
signup__book_details__brand_caption: Your cover updates as you type. This is how guests see your book.
signup__book_details__countdown_days: {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} away
signup__cover__subtitle: Upload your own or choose a placeholder — you can change it whenever.
signup__cover__skip: Skip for now — you have until 14 days before the wedding
signup__cover__brand_caption: Your cover photo sets the tone of every guest screen. Upload an engagement shot, a venue picture, or pick a tone for now.
signup__cover__file_size: {size} MB · uploads after you finish setup
signup__claim__subtitle: This is the short URL your QR cards point to. Keep it simple — easy to say, easy to type.
signup__claim__brand_lead_a: This short URL is where guests
signup__plan__subtitle: Start free. Upgrade anytime — even after the wedding. Download a .zip of every message any time.
signup__plan__upgrade_hint: You can upgrade at any time from your dashboard
signup__plan__keepsake__description_v2: Print-ready QR cards, custom couple URL, one year online.
signup__plan__gold__description_v2: Everything in Keepsake, with two full years online.
signup__completion__creating_body: Reserving your link and opening up the guestbook.
signup__completion__redirecting_body: You'll come right back here once your payment is confirmed.
signup__completion__error_create_default: We couldn't create your book. Please try again.
signup__completion__error_checkout_defau: Couldn't start checkout. Your book is live — you can upgrade from Settings.
signup__completion__next_share_body: Send guests the URL or print the QR code
signup__completion__next_dashboard_body: Listen to messages as they arrive
signup__pricing__billing_disclaimer: Final charge may show in your local currency at checkout.
